title: Audio Cue
description: Phase 2.2 audio cue record. A music or audio cue attached to a Logic session, carried through cue sheets, ADR lists, and Foley lists with full lineage (cue_id and scene_id preserved).

cue_id.description: Stable cue identifier, e.g. HWTF-MUS-014. Retained through cue sheet export for lineage.

scene_id.description: Scene this cue belongs to, e.g. HWTF-S04.

logic_marker.description: Marker label placed on the Logic marker track.

stem_requirements.description: Stems this cue requires. Cues with adr appear on the ADR list; cues with foley appear on the Foley list.
